svg.text: Bursary Management System - Full Entity-Relationship Diagram

g.text: • All tables use UUID primary keys for better security & distribution
• National ID uniqueness prevents fraud (duplicate applications blocked)
• Indexed fields (user_id, national_id, status) for fast queries
• Soft deletes via is_active flags (data retention for auditing)
• Audit timestamps (created_at, updated_at) on all tables
• Multi-level approval workflow (Ward → CDF → Super Admin)
• Application scoring system (0-100 points per category)
